name: weekly-review-report
description: Monday morning report summarising all PR review activity from the past 7 days. Provides visibility into team review velocity, common issue patterns, and individual contribution stats. Posted to the team Google Chat space.
prompt: Generate the weekly PR review report for the past 7 days across all configured repositories. Aggregate: total PRs reviewed, breakdown by verdict (approved / needs-changes / blocked), most common issue types flagged, average time from PR open to first review, and per-author PR count. Post the formatted report to the PR review Google Chat space.
